title: Bridge Essay: Transdiagnostic conceptualization of schizophrenia and autism spectrum disorder.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Nondual/Unity** (Phase 16) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Nondual/Unity to mechanistic neuroscience through Transdiagnostic, conceptualization, of, schizophrenia, and.

**Transdiagnostic conceptualization of schizophrenia and autism spectrum disorder. An integrative framework of minimal self disturbance.** — Neuropsychopharmacol Hung. PMID: 39760675. DOI:. Autism spectrum disorder and schizophrenia are traditionally viewed as distinct diagnostic categories. However, evidence increasingly suggests overlapping pathological functioning at various levels, starting from brain circuitry to behaviour. Notably, both disorders are characterized by anomalous minimal self-experience (altered body ownership and agency), which is atrait-like, phenomenological distortion.
